3186310.name: FUR Squadron Phoenix Demo
3186310.description:
A new chapter of the FUR Squadron saga:



Meet the FUR Squadron! They will turn you into a real ace pilot, hone your skills before it's too late!

The demo includes two playable levels, the Prologue Phoenix Down and Tropical Strike, as well as cinematics and dialogues that delve into the story of Cadet Erith Robin and the FUR Squadron.



It features three of the unlockable weapons in the final game: the Guided Bomb, the Laser Beam and the Multi-Missile Barrage.

Includes the Overdrive, a support ability that temporarily increases the Starfighter's capabilities.



"War drums are beating at the Bist System. Alarmed by the increasing activity of the dangerous Marauders, the Chimera Federation has decided to reinforce the troops of its space fleet. A brave and determined recruit is sent to the renegade FUR Squadron for special training using their virtual reality technology. Will they manage to hone their skills before it's too late?"
3186310.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 日语
